name: TreeSelect
searchText: treeselect select with hierarchical tree data @mantine/core /core/tree-select allowdeselect checkstrictly checkedstrategy chevronarialabels chevroncolor clearbuttonprops clearsearchonchange clearsectionmode clearable comboboxprops data defaultdropdownopened defaultexpandall defaultexpandedvalues defaultsearchvalue defaultvalue description descriptionprops disabled dropdownopened error errorprops expandonclick expandedvalues filter hiddeninputprops hiddeninputvaluesdivider inputcontainer inputsize inputwrapperorder label labelprops leftsection leftsectionpointerevents leftsectionprops leftsectionwidth loading loadingposition maxdisplayedvalues maxdisplayedvaluescontent maxdropdownheight maxvalues mode nothingfoundmessage onchange onclear ondropdownclose ondropdownopen onexpandedchange onremove onsearchchange openonfocus pointer radius rendernode required rightsection rightsectionpointerevents rightsectionprops rightsectionwidth scrollareaprops searchvalue searchable size value withasterisk witherrorstyles withlines wrapperprops

props.name: allowDeselect
props.description: Allows deselecting in single mode

props.name: checkStrictly
props.description: Disables parent-child cascade in checkbox mode

props.name: checkedStrategy
props.description: Controls which checked nodes appear in value/pills in checkbox mode

props.name: chevronAriaLabels
props.description: aria-label values for the expand/collapse chevron button

props.name: chevronColor
props.description: Controls the default chevron color

props.name: clearButtonProps
props.description: Props for the clear button

props.name: clearSearchOnChange
props.description: Clear search on selection change

props.name: clearSectionMode
props.description: Determines how the clear button and rightSection are rendered

props.name: clearable
props.description: Shows clear button

props.name: comboboxProps
props.description: Props passed to the underlying Combobox

props.name: data
props.description: Tree data

props.name: defaultDropdownOpened
props.description: Default dropdown state

props.name: defaultExpandAll
props.description: Expand all nodes by default

props.name: defaultExpandedValues
props.description: Default expanded node values

props.name: defaultSearchValue
props.description: Default search value

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default value

props.name: description
props.description: Contents of Input.Description component. If not set, description is not displayed.

props.name: descriptionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Description component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute on the input element

props.name: dropdownOpened
props.description: Controlled dropdown state

props.name: error
props.description: Contents of Input.Error component. If not set, error is not displayed.

props.name: errorProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Error component

props.name: expandOnClick
props.description: Also toggle expand when clicking a parent node (not just the chevron). In single and multiple modes, parent clicks only expand; only leaves can be selected. In checkbox mode, parent clicks both check and expand.

props.name: expandedValues
props.description: Controlled expanded state

props.name: filter
props.description: Custom filter function

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props for the hidden input

props.name: hiddenInputValuesDivider
props.description: Divider for hidden input values

props.name: inputContainer
props.description: Render function to wrap the input element. Useful for adding tooltips, popovers, or other wrappers around the input.

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: inputWrapperOrder
props.description: Controls order and visibility of wrapper elements. Only elements included in this array will be rendered.

props.name: label
props.description: Contents of Input.Label component. If not set, label is not displayed.

props.name: labelProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Label component

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: maxDisplayedValues
props.description: Maximum displayed pills before "+N more"

props.name: maxDisplayedValuesContent
props.description: Content shown when values overflow maxDisplayedValues

props.name: maxDropdownHeight
props.description: Max dropdown height

props.name: maxValues
props.description: Maximum selectable values (multiple/checkbox mode)

props.name: mode
props.description: Selection mode: 'single', 'multiple', or 'checkbox' (with cascade)

props.name: nothingFoundMessage
props.description: Message when no nodes match search

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when clear button is clicked

props.name: onDropdownClose
props.description: Called when dropdown closes

props.name: onDropdownOpen
props.description: Called when dropdown opens

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Called when expanded state changes

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Called with removed value in multiple/checkbox mode

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called when search changes

props.name: openOnFocus
props.description: Opens dropdown on focus (searchable mode)

props.name: pointer
props.description: Determines whether the input should have cursor: pointer style. Use when input acts as a button-like trigger (e.g., component="button" for Select/DatePicker).

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: renderNode
props.description: Custom node rendering in the dropdown

props.name: required
props.description: Adds required attribute to the input and a red asterisk on the right side of label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props for the ScrollArea in the dropdown

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Controlled search value

props.name: searchable
props.description: Enables search filtering

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height, horizontal padding, and font-size

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value

props.name: withAsterisk
props.description: If set, the required asterisk is displayed next to the label. Overrides required prop. Does not add required attribute to the input.

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: withLines
props.description: Show tree connection lines between parent and child nodes

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element
